Gas Prices Today, June 5: Check fuel latest rates in California, Texas, Florida, New York, and Pennsylvania as National Average sees a dip

regions.why: WTI crude is falling and U.S. prices are dropping, signaling downward momentum. Saskatchewan is 3¢ above the local low, and retail lag suggests further declines incoming over the next few days.

regions.why: WTI crude is falling and already 3% down, signaling downward pressure on retail prices. Current price sits 3.1% above the nearby low, suggesting room to drop further in coming days as the crude decline filters through.
